articles.title: Aldon Smith’s net worth: Inside the fortune of the former 49ers pass-rushing star
articles.description: Aldon Smith had an estimated net worth of $5 million when he died on June 13, 2026. The former San Francisco 49ers star earned more than $19.5 million during his NFL career. Known for his dominant pass-rushing ability, Smith reached great heights early in football but faced several setbacks off the field. Even after retirement, he spent time mentoring young athletes and sharing lessons from his own journey.

articles.title: GBA completes 51% of white-topping works in Bengaluru
articles.description: Bengaluru roads: The Greater Bengaluru Authority has completed 51% of white-topping works under its Rs 1,700 crore infrastructure project. Officials have been directed to speed up pending road works and complete buffer roads on schedule.

articles.description: TOKYO, June 16 : The Bank of Japan raised interest rates to a 31-year high on Tuesday, marking another landmark step in normalising monetary policy as it focused on taming price pressures from the energy shock caused by the Iran war.The hike was the first since December and aligns the BOJ with other central b

articles.title: Govt hikes export duties on diesel by Rs 14, ATF by Rs 12.5 per litre
articles.description: The Centre hiked export duties on diesel by Rs 14/litre and ATF by Rs 12.5/litre. Amid this, the Petroleum Ministry assured sufficient fuel supply, explaining that retail pressure was due to bulk consumers shifting from consumer pumps.

articles.title: SpaceX shares skyrocket as money raised hits $85.7 billion
articles.description: The stock climbed 19.7 percent in Monday trading to $192.8, extending Friday's 19 percent gain after the shares first started trading on the Nasdaq at $135.

articles.title: French Proverb of the Day: 'A woman and a ship ever want...' Life lessons on complexity, commitment, personal growth, communication, attention, patience, active listening, well-being, maintenance, and why relationships need continuous effort
articles.description: French Proverb of the Day highlights an old saying, “A woman and a ship ever want mending.” The proverb explains how relationships, personal growth, communication, well-being, and other important parts of life need continuous effort. Though the saying comes from a historical period, its lessons remain useful today. It teaches patience, attention, active listening, maintenance, commitment, and the importance of caring for valuable things before problems become larger.

articles.title: Grab One of These Deep Early Prime Day Discounts on Lenovo Laptops and Desktops
articles.description: Want to pick up a new PC from one of our favorite companies? Lenovo is dropping prices before Prime Day on these well-reviewed models.

articles.title: Axis Max Life Achieves Highest-Ever Claims Paid Ratio of 99.8%* in FY26
articles.description: New Delhi [India], June 15: Axis Max Life Insurance Ltd. formerly known as Max Life Insurance Company Ltd ("Axis Max Life"/ "Company"), has settled 20,529 individual death claims worth ₹1641 Cr. in FY 2025-26, achieving its highest-ever individual death claims paid ratio of 99.8%*. This marks a consistent rise from 99.34% in FY21-22, reinforcing 99.8%* as the Company's new benchmark for trust -- India Ke Bharose Ka NumberTM+. Since its inception, Axis Max Life has paid a total of ₹11,772.21 Crores towards death claims on 2,43,524 policies.

articles.title: US stocks: US market rallies, Dow ends with record on US-Iran deal, oil price slide
articles.description: Wall Street indexes surged Monday, with the Dow hitting a record high following a preliminary US-Iran agreement that eased inflation fears and sent oil prices plummeting. This relief rally boosted rate-sensitive tech stocks and energy-dependent sectors like airlines, while the Federal Reserve's upcoming policy update remains a key focus.

articles.title: Goods exports hit record high of $45.2 billion in May 2026, trade deficit widens on higher import growth
articles.description: India's merchandise exports reach a record $45.2 billion in May 2026, while trade deficit widens due to rising imports.

articles.title: JNAC to install water ATMs at 10 locations in JSR
articles.description: JNAC to install water ATMs at 10 Jamshedpur locations, starting at JNAC office; chilled purified water from Rs 1 via coin or UPI, 1–20L options.

articles.title: SpaceX shares surge 6%, company's valuation tops USD 2 trillion
articles.description: SpaceX shares surged 6% to USD170, pushing its valuation past USD2 trillion. The spike follows its debut and positive market sentiment. Oppenheimer gave an 'outperform' rating with a USD190 price target, citing its integrated AI capabilities.

articles.title: June-July ration quota to be distributed together, says DC

articles.title: BBC Layoffs: Around 2,000 jobs at risk as broadcaster plans 10% cost cuts; Who may lose their jobs and why
articles.description: BBC Layoff 2026: The BBC is preparing to cut approximately 2,000 jobs, equivalent to around 10% of its workforce costs, as part of a wider plan to reduce spending by £500 million over the next two years. The broadcaster's news division is expected to be among the hardest hit, with reports suggesting that some radio programmes could also be affected by the cost-cutting measures.

articles.title: Shriram Properties inks joint development pact for 9.1-acre land in Bengaluru
articles.description: Shriram Properties has signed a joint development agreement for a significant land parcel in Bengaluru. The company plans to develop a large residential project on this 9.1-acre site. This move expands Shriram Properties' presence in a growing Bengaluru micro-market. The project aims to cater to the mid-market and mid-premium segments. It represents a strategic expansion for the developer.

articles.description: Commercial flight services officially commenced at Noida International Airport with an IndiGo flight arriving from Lucknow at around 7.55 am.

articles.title: Flexi cap fund inflows halve to Rs 5,175 crore in May after record April. Is this profit booking or a buying opportunity?
articles.description: Flexi cap fund inflows dropped 49% in May to Rs 5,175 crore after April’s record surge, reflecting broader moderation across equity categories. Experts attribute this to profit booking and global uncertainties, not a structural shift. Investors are advised to continue SIPs, as long-term fundamentals and category preference remain intact.

articles.title: Kerala SSLC Result 2026 for Revaluation & Scrutiny declared @ sslcexam.kerala.gov.in, direct link here
articles.description: The Kerala Pareeksha Bhavan (KBPE) has declared the SSLC Revaluation and Scrutiny Result 2026 today, June 15. Candidates who were dissatisfied with their initial Class 10 marks and applied for a recheck can now check their revised scores on the official portal.

articles.title: Vedanta Oil and Gas shares list at Rs 39 on BSE as 4 demerged entities debut on Dalal Street

The company’s valuation came broadly in line with estimates, marking a key milestone in one of India’s largest corporate restructuring exercises.

articles.title: SEPC rallies after securing Rs 673-crore order from SAIL's IISCO Steel Plant
articles.description: SEPC surged 7.50% to Rs 7.45 after the company announced that it had secured a major order worth Rs 673.32 crore from Steel Authority of India (SAIL)'s IISCO Steel Plant (ISP), Burnpur, for its 4.08 MTPA crude steel expansion project.

articles.title: Centre approves ₹1,667-crore expansion plan for Srinagar airport
articles.description: Director, airport, Javed Anjum, said that the area of the terminal will increase by 255% with a capacity to handle 15 aircraft from the current six. He said that the passenger capacity will increase to 10 million (1 crore) passengers per annum within the next 4 years.

articles.description: Food safety: Officials raided 236 food outlets, grocery stores and e-commerce warehouses across Bengaluru, booking 44 cases over expired products and misbranding while collecting Rs 1.97 lakh in penalties.

articles.title: Nice Mayor welcomes PM Modi, eyes stronger trade and investment ties
articles.description: Nice Mayor Eric Ciotti welcomed PM Narendra Modi, calling him 'at home' and seeking deeper ties in trade and investment. The visit saw India and France unveil 13 major outcomes, including a plan to double bilateral trade in five years.
